senses.definition: a moisturizing skincare product made from rich ingredients to hydrate and nourish the skin
lotion that is applied to the body to moisturize it and make it smoother and softer

examples.x: She applied body lotion after taking a shower to keep her skin smooth.
The body lotion has a subtle floral fragrance.
She prefers body lotion with natural ingredients like aloe vera.
The body lotion comes in a pump bottle for easy application.
The body lotion absorbed quickly, leaving no greasy feeling.

senses.definition: a thick, semi-solid substance used for moisturizing and soothing the skin

examples.x: She applied a rich cream to her hands to keep them soft.
The doctor recommended a soothing cream for the rash.
The cream provided instant relief for her sunburn.
He uses a special cream to treat his dry skin.
She always carries a small jar of cream in her bag for emergencies.

senses.definition: a product made for washing hands, typically in liquid, bar, or foaming form
a skincare product made from nourishing oils to moisturize and hydrate the skin
lotion that is applied to the hands to moisturize them and make them smoother and softer

examples.x: She keeps a small bottle of hand lotion in her bag.
The hand lotion absorbed quickly without leaving a greasy residue.
The spa provided complimentary hand lotion for their guests.
She prefers hand lotion made with natural ingredients.
He gifted her a set of scented hand lotions for her birthday.

senses.definition: a substance, such as a balm or cream, which is applied to the skin in order to remedy dryness
a moisturizing substance or ingredient that softens and soothes the skin
a substance that the face is covered with temporarily and is then removed in order to soothe or heal the skin

examples.x: She applied a clay face mask to draw out impurities and reduce oiliness from her skin.
The hydrating face mask left her skin feeling soft and moisturized after a long day outdoors.
He used a charcoal face mask to unclog pores and minimize blackheads on his nose.
The spa offered a relaxing facial treatment that included a customized face mask for each client's skin type.
Her weekly skincare routine included using a brightening face mask to even out her complexion and reduce dark spots.

senses.definition: a skincare product used to exfoliate and promote smoother skin
a specialized skincare product or treatment that is designed to exfoliate and cleanse the scalp
a skincare product used to exfoliate and cleanse the face, promoting smoother, clearer skin
a skincare product designed to enhance the skin's natural radiance and promote a glowing complexion
a skincare product formulated to address signs of aging and loss of elasticity, to promote a more youthful appearance
a skincare product that provides targeted treatment for the face, typically used after cleansing and toning
‌a liquid, typically made from flowers, that has a pleasant smell

examples.x: He bought a new bottle of his favorite perfume as a gift for his girlfriend.
She sprayed a little perfume on her wrist before going out to dinner.
The luxurious perfume brand was known for its high-quality ingredients.
The perfume lingered in the air long after she had left the room.
The store offered a wide variety of perfumes, from floral to fruity scents.

senses.definition: the smell that something releases, which can be detected by the nose
a liquid that people put on some parts of their skin or clothes to smell better

examples.x: He applied cologne before going out for the evening.
The store offers a wide range of colognes from various brands.
She complimented him on his choice of cologne; it had a fresh scent.
Many people prefer cologne over perfume for its lighter fragrance.
He received a bottle of cologne as a gift for his birthday.

senses.definition: a fragrant liquid product used as a light perfume or body splash
a pleasant or sweet-smelling scent or aroma, often used in perfumes, colognes, and other scented products
a fragrant floral water derived from rose petals, often used in skincare and beauty products for its soothing and refreshing properties
a resinous aromatic gum obtained from certain tree species, often used in perfumes, incense, and traditional medicine
a light and refreshing fragrance formulation typically containing a lower concentration of aromatic compounds
a skincare product derived from the gel of the aloe vera plant and used for its moisturizing, soothing, and healing properties on the skin
a personal care product designed to reduce or prevent sweating by blocking sweat glands and controlling body odor
a healing or soothing substance with a nice smell applied to the skin in order to relieve pain, irritation, or discomfort

examples.x: She applied a cooling balm to her sunburned skin to soothe the pain.
Lavender essential oil is known for its calming properties and is often used as a balm for stress
After a long day on her feet, she massaged a soothing balm into her tired muscles.
Aloe vera gel is a natural balm known for its ability to calm and moisturize sunburned skin.
The herbal balm provided instant relief to his chapped lips in the dry winter weather.

senses.definition: a medicated skin product that combines zinc oxide and ferric oxide to provide soothing relief from itching, irritation, and mild skin conditions
a substance that is used to clean a surface, especially a cosmetic that cleans the skin
a cosmetic cream applied to the face to make it clear and soft
a substance that people put on their skin to make it smell better or to hide bad ones

examples.x: She applies deodorant every morning before going to work.
He prefers a natural deodorant made with organic ingredients.
After exercising, it is important to reapply deodorant to stay fresh.
He discovered that some deodorants can cause skin irritation.

senses.definition: a skincare product or ingredient used to remove dead skin cells from the surface of the skin, revealing smoother, brighter skin underneath
a cream that is applied to the face to soothe or cleanse the skin

examples.x: She applied a thick layer of face cream before going to bed.
The face cream helped to reduce the dryness on her skin.
He switched to a new face cream that promised anti-aging benefits.
She always carries her favorite face cream in her bag for dry spots.
The dermatologist recommended a gentle face cream for sensitive skin.

senses.definition: a substance that the face is covered with temporarily and is then removed in order to soothe or heal the skin
the process of creating or developing a specific composition or recipe for a product
a natural waxy substance derived from sheep's wool, commonly used in skincare products for its moisturizing and protective properties
any type of liquid that is put on the skin to protect or clean it

examples.x: She applied lotion after her shower to keep her skin soft and hydrated.
The lotion absorbed quickly and did not leave a greasy feel.
He preferred a fragrance-free lotion for sensitive skin.
She carried a small bottle of lotion in her bag for dry hands.
The lotion contained aloe vera, making it soothing for sunburned skin.

senses.definition: a substance that the face is covered with temporarily and is then removed in order to clean or improve the skin
a skincare product made from mud or clay that is applied to the face or body to help cleanse, detoxify, and nourish the skin
a liquid cosmetic that is applied to the hair or skin to soften or protect it
a substance, usually smooth and oily, rubbed on the skin for medical purposes

examples.x: The doctor prescribed an antibiotic ointment to apply to the wound to prevent infection.
The pharmacist recommended a soothing ointment for the patient's dry and irritated skin.
The athlete applied a muscle-relaxing ointment to alleviate soreness after the intense workout.
The burn victim received a specialized ointment to promote healing and reduce scarring.
The herbal ointment provided relief from the insect bites by soothing the itching and reducing inflammation.

senses.definition: a semi-solid substance derived from petroleum, used for its moisturizing and protective properties
a product in liquid form that is applied by rolling a ball or rollerball applicator over the skin
any medicinal ointment that accelerates the recovery of the skin barrier or protects it
a protective lotion or cream that helps to prevent the harmful effects of the sun's ultraviolet (UV) rays on the skin

examples.x: He applied sunblock before going to the beach to avoid sunburn.
The doctor recommended using a high-SPF sunblock for outdoor activities.
Sunblock should be reapplied every two hours when swimming.
She forgot to pack her sunblock, so she had to buy some at the store.
Make sure to choose a sunblock that offers broad-spectrum protection.

senses.definition: a cream that is applied to the skin to protect it from the harmful rays of the sun

examples.x: The dermatologist recommended using a broad-spectrum sunscreen for best protection.
He always keeps a bottle of sunscreen in his beach bag.
Water-resistant sunscreen is ideal for swimming or outdoor activities.

senses.definition: a liquid cosmetic that is applied to the face in order to cleanse the skin and make it less oily
a type of medicinal or healing ointment or salve applied to the skin

examples.x: The doctor prescribed an unguent to soothe the patient's irritated skin.
She applied the herbal unguent to her sunburn, finding instant relief.
The ancient remedy included an unguent made from various healing herbs and oils.
After a long day of hiking, he massaged his sore muscles with a cooling unguent.
The pharmacist recommended a strong unguent to treat the persistent rash.

senses.definition: a brand name for petroleum jelly, a semi-solid mixture derived from petroleum that is used as a protective and moisturizing agent for the skin
a liquid or substance utilized for cleaning, typically for personal hygiene or cleaning purposes, such as hand wash, face wash, or body wash
a soft, padded covering worn over the eyes during sleep to block out light and create darkness for improved rest
a cosmetic product formulated to promote the growth, thickness, and fullness of eyebrows
a facial massage tool made of jade that promotes relaxation, reduces puffiness, and improves circulation
a skincare tool used to cool and soothe the skin, reduce puffiness, and relieve minor skin irritations by rolling it over the face or body
a skincare tool that uses bristles or silicone bristles to deeply cleanse the skin by exfoliating and removing dirt and makeup
a soft mask worn over the eyes to block out light and aid in sleep
a spray or misting product applied to the face for hydration, refreshment, or skincare benefits
a liquid product in a spray or mist form that is applied to the face for hydration, refreshment, or skincare benefits
any type of substance that one uses to add more color or definition to one's face in order to alter or enhance one's appearance

examples.x: She applied her makeup carefully before the big event.
He noticed her makeup was vibrant and skillfully done.
They offered a makeup tutorial to help others learn techniques.
She prefers natural makeup for everyday wear.
He was surprised by how quickly she could do her makeup.

senses.definition: a skincare product applied under the eyes for hydration, reducing puffiness, and diminishing dark circles or fine lines
